code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut done = false
  mut result = "(none)"

  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let trimmed = string.trim(line)
      if not string.is_empty(trimmed)
        result = trimmed
        done = true
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end

  println(result)
end
